description: Create a two-column content slide on China luxury market outlook with side-by-side bullet lists summarizing brand landscape dynamics and business environment uncertainties.

header.headline: Brand landscape is becoming more dynamic; cautiously optimistic outlook on China luxury market

left.title: Strong growth in 2010 & majority of 2011; with a more dynamic and active brand landscape

items.text: Continued expansion into tier 2/3 cities, with a slower pace
Leading brands emphasizing more and more on improving customer experience
Acceleration of online platforms as channel for brand marketing and ecommerce

right.title: Overall business environment remains positive with a few uncertainties
